final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-ready photo of stylish coffee and desserts in a Korean cafe setting, captured as if shot on a smartphone.

Style/medium: needs a "Korean cafe" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Seoul 延南洞/弘大 indie cafe culture, 2010s-2020s Korean lifestyle magazine editorial (Kinfolk Korea, Cereal), soft minimalist Scandinavian-Japanese fusion interiors; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a top-down or 45-degree angle shot typical of smartphone food photography, no people visible
Subject: must include a coffee beverage and dessert arrangement as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior context — wooden tables, soft natural light, minimalist decor
Lighting/mood: needs bright, soft natural daylight atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs warm, muted tones with cream and beige dominance — exact color balance is yours
Materials/textures: must include ceramic cups, wooden surfaces, fabric napkins typical of Korean cafe styling
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten annotations with the following characteristics:
  - Style: thin white hand-drawn lines, rough and slightly uneven single-stroke writing
  - Outline strokes tracing object perimeters
  - Arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance
  - Content: diary-style, one-line emotional comments in Japanese (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji)
  - Categories:
    • Drink comments: taste, temperature, mood (e.g., さっぱり、優しい甘み)
    • Food comments: texture, deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、最高)
    • Space comments: atmosphere (e.g., リラックス、いい時間)
    • Overall summary: one-line conclusion (e.g., 幸せすぎる～)
  - Decorative elements: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons (moderate, with intentional negative space)
Constraints: must be Instagram Stories / rough magazine notes style; fashionable yet relaxed atmosphere; no people in frame
Avoid:
